tests/fixtures/x509_cert_fixture.der — reproduction note
=========================================================

This file is a hand-crafted Ed25519-keyed self-signed X.509 certificate,
generated once, bytes committed. We do NOT regenerate at CI time because
Ed25519 key generation uses OS randomness — the same recipe produces a
different cert each run (Subject/Issuer/Serial/Validity deterministic;
key bytes + signature bytes random).

Deterministic content:
  Subject:     CN=cipherpost-fixture, O=cipherpost, C=XX
  Issuer:      CN=cipherpost-fixture, O=cipherpost, C=XX  (self-signed)
  Serial:      0x01
  Public key:  Ed25519 (algorithm OID 1.3.101.112)
  Validity:    2-year window from generation time (Apr 2026 → Apr 2028)

Recipe (requires OpenSSL 3.0+):

  openssl req -x509 -newkey ed25519 -keyout /tmp/key.pem \
      -out /tmp/cert.pem -nodes -days 730 \
      -subj "/CN=cipherpost-fixture/O=cipherpost/C=XX" \
      -set_serial 1 -addext "subjectKeyIdentifier=hash"

  openssl x509 -in /tmp/cert.pem -outform DER -out x509_cert_fixture.der

Verification (non-signature fields, deterministic):

  openssl x509 -in x509_cert_fixture.der -inform DER -noout -subject
  # -> subject=CN=cipherpost-fixture, O=cipherpost, C=XX

  openssl x509 -in x509_cert_fixture.der -inform DER -noout -serial
  # -> serial=01

This fixture is small (~388 bytes) and serves two purposes:
  1. Input to payload::ingest::x509_cert() in integration tests.
  2. Payload for MockTransport round-trip tests (tests/x509_roundtrip.rs).

The fixture is REPLACED — not renamed, not versioned — only when the
deterministic fields above change. If x509-parser 0.16's parse behavior
ever regresses, this fixture should keep passing (it's a minimal valid
RFC 5280 strict-profile cert).

SHA-256 of the committed file (recorded at generation time, for tamper
detection during reviews):
  b956e59da145d19841087aeb2dc5d8fc3f9f6b597f4c7d260aff833e1281a755  x509_cert_fixture.der

SHA-256 of the cert (as rendered by `openssl ... -fingerprint -sha256`):
  B9:56:E5:9D:A1:45:D1:98:41:08:7A:EB:2D:C5:D8:FC:3F:9F:6B:59:7F:4C:7D:26:0A:FF:83:3E:12:81:A7:55

Generated: 2026-04-24, OpenSSL 3.5.4 (30 Sep 2025)
